page.question: What can I help you with today?
page.placeholder: How can I help you with your data today?
page.noDataSourceError: Please connect a data source before starting a chat

help.title: What can Scavenger do?
help.description: Explore the key features that help you get more from your data.

chat.label: Chat with your Data
chat.title: Chat with your Data
chat.description: Ask any question about your data in plain language. Scavenger is an AI agent that analyzes your data end-to-end: it writes and runs SQL queries, creates visualizations (bar, line, pie, area charts and more), and searches the web when external context helps answer your question. Just ask what you want to know.

context.label: Manage Context
context.title: Manage Context
context.description: Teach Scavenger how your business works. Add golden queries (proven questions that always return the right answer), business rules (definitions, KPIs, logic the agent should follow), and upload documents to the context vault. The more context you provide, the more accurate your answers become.

dataUpload.label: Upload Data
dataUpload.title: Upload Data
dataUpload.description: Upload files directly into Scavenger. Supported formats include Excel, CSV, PDF, Word, PowerPoint, text, markdown, email, and images. Upload multiple files at once, name your datasets, and track indexing progress in real time. Your uploaded data becomes part of the conversation instantly.

dataConnection.label: Connect Data
dataConnection.title: Connect Data
dataConnection.description: Connect your existing databases and data warehouses securely. Scavenger supports 60+ connectors including PostgreSQL, MySQL, Snowflake, BigQuery, Databricks, MongoDB, and many more. Every connection supports SSL encryption and SSH tunneling to keep your data protected.

dashboards.label: Share Dashboards
dashboards.title: Share Dashboards
dashboards.description: Pin your best charts and tables to a dashboard, then share it with your team via a link. Dashboards auto-refresh on a schedule you choose, so everyone always sees the latest numbers without re-running anything.

emailReports.label: Set up Email Reports
emailReports.title: Set up Email Reports
emailReports.description: Get AI-powered reports delivered to your inbox on a schedule. Scavenger compares the latest data to previous snapshots, highlights what changed, flags anomalies, and summarizes the key insights. Manage recipients, customize the content, and let your team unsubscribe with one click.

dataQuality.label: Check Data Quality
dataQuality.title: Check Data Quality
dataQuality.description: Get an automatic health check of your data. Scavenger profiles your tables, flags anomalies, and helps you spot gaps or inconsistencies so you can trust the numbers before making decisions.

chat.userMessage: What were our top 5 products by revenue last quarter?
chat.agentSummary: Your best seller was Sneakers at $48K, up 14% from last quarter.

context.userMessage: Remember that revenue is always calculated as net after returns.
context.savedConfirmation: Saved to Context Vault as a business rule.

dataUpload.dropzoneText: Drop files here or click to upload

emailReports.aiSummaryBody: Revenue increased 12% to $340K compared to last week. New signups up 8% driven by the summer campaign.
emailReports.anomalyWarning: Customer churn spiked 23% in EMEA region, investigate pricing changes.
emailReports.positiveInsight: APAC revenue crossed $74K for the first time this quarter.

growth.label: Growth
prompts: Identify areas in which I could improve revenue for my review
Summarize overall performance and improvement opportunities
Make a marketing strategy based on my data to drive growth
Which customer segments have the highest growth potential?
What products or services are trending up vs down?

efficiency.label: Efficiency
prompts: Give me a list of potential cost saving opportunities for my review
Look at profit and suggest how to increase it
What are my biggest profit drivers which are underutilized?
Where am I spending resources with low return?
Which processes or areas have the most inefficiency?

understand.label: Understand
prompts: Suggest and explain metrics which I can analyze nicely and drill down into
Explain the key concepts in my database in simple language
What are details in the data usually overlooked?
Give me a tour of my data and what questions it can answer
What are the relationships between my key entities?

dataQuality.label: Data Quality
prompts: What is important but not covered by my data?
Create a semantic layer of my data
Identify a strategy for cleaning my data
Find potential mistakes in my data for me to check
Where are there gaps or inconsistencies in my data?

risk.label: Risk
prompts: What unusual patterns should I investigate?
Identify potential fraud or suspicious activity
What risks are hidden in my data?
Flag outliers that need human review
What's changed unexpectedly in recent data?

customers.label: Customers
prompts: Who are my most valuable customers and why?
Which customers are at risk of churning?
What do my best customers have in common?
How do customer segments differ in behavior?
What drives customer lifetime value?

forecasting.label: Forecasting
prompts: What trends should I plan for?
Predict next quarter based on historical patterns
What seasonal patterns exist in my data?
Where is demand likely to increase or decrease?
What leading indicators should I watch?

operations.label: Operations
prompts: Where are my bottlenecks?
Which processes take longer than expected?
What capacity do I have available?
Where are resources over or under-allocated?
What operational KPIs should I track daily?
